app.appearance-settings.accent-color.des.message: Choose the color used for buttons, selections, and highlights.

app.appearance-settings.advanced-renderi.message: Enables advanced rendering such as blur effects that may cause performance issues without hardware-accelerated rendering.

app.appearance-settings.color-theme.desc.message: Select your preferred color theme for Axolotl Launcher.

app.appearance-settings.custom-backgroun.message: Soften image details to keep launcher content easy to read.
Choose a custom image and fine-tune how it blends with the launcher interface.
Control how strongly the image shows through the interface.

app.appearance-settings.default-landing-.message: Change the page to which the launcher opens on.

app.appearance-settings.hide-nametag.des.message: Disables the nametag above your player on the skins page.

app.appearance-settings.jump-back-into-w.message: Includes recent worlds in the "Jump back in" section on the Home page.

app.appearance-settings.minimize-launche.message: Minimize the launcher when a Minecraft process starts.

app.appearance-settings.native-decoratio.message: Use system window frame (app restart required).

app.appearance-settings.show-play-time.d.message: Displays how much time you've spent playing an instance.

app.appearance-settings.skip-non-essenti.message: Automatically skips low-risk confirmations like duplicate modpack installs, normal content deletion, bulk updates, unlinking modpacks, and repair prompts. Dangerous warnings will still be shown.

app.appearance-settings.toggle-sidebar.d.message: Enables the ability to toggle the sidebar.

app.appearance-settings.unknown-pack-war.message: If you attempt to install a Modrinth Pack file (.mrpack) that isn't hosted on Modrinth, we'll make sure you understand the risks before installing it.
Warn me before installing unknown modpacks

app.auth-servers.unreachable.body.message: Minecraft authentication servers may be down right now. Check your internet connection and try again later.

app.auth.sign-in-browser.message: Please sign in in the browser window that just opened to continue.

app.browse.server-instance-content-warni.message: Adding content can break compatibility when joining the server. Any added content will also be lost when you update the server instance content.

app.content-install.no-compatible-versio.message: No available versions match {compatibilityLabel}. Select a version to install anyway. Dependencies will not be installed automatically.

app.error.account-description.message: Check that you signed in with the correct account. You may own Minecraft on another Microsoft account.

app.error.directory-description.message: Axolotl Launcher cannot migrate to the selected directory. Contact support for help or cancel the directory change.

app.error.hosts-description.message: The connection to Microsoft, Xbox, or Minecraft services was rejected. These services may be blocked by your hosts file. See our support article for steps to fix the issue.

app.error.loader-description.message: Axolotl Launcher could not find a loader version for this instance.

app.error.loader-fix.message: Repair the instance using the button below.

app.error.minecraft-auth-title.message: Unable to sign in to Minecraft

app.error.minecraft-required.message: To play this instance, sign in with Microsoft below. If you do not have a Minecraft account, you can purchase the game on the Minecraft website.

app.error.network-description.message: Axolotl Launcher had trouble connecting to Microsoft services. This is often caused by a poor connection. Try again, and use our support article if the issue persists.

app.error.official-launcher-after.message: first. When that is complete, return here and sign in.

app.error.official-launcher-title.message: Using PC Game Pass, coming from Bedrock, or just bought the game?

app.error.permissions-description.message: Axolotl Launcher cannot write to the selected directory. Adjust its permissions and try again, or cancel the directory change.

app.error.space-description.message: The disk containing the selected directory does not have enough free space. Free some space and try again, or cancel the directory change.

app.error.state-description.message: Axolotl Launcher failed to load correctly. A file may be corrupted or an essential file may be missing.

app.error.state-fix-internet.message: Check your internet connection, then restart the app.

app.error.state-fix-redownload.message: Download and install the app again.

app.error.support-description.message: If you still need help, visit our support page and provide the following debug information.

app.fundraiser.days-left.message: {count, plural, one {# day left} other {# days left}}

app.instance.confirm-delete.admonition-b.message: All data for your instance will be permanently deleted, including your worlds, configs, and all installed content.

app.instance.modpack-already-installed.b.message: This modpack is already installed in the <bold>{instanceName}</bold> instance. Are you sure you want to duplicate it?

app.instance.mods.share-text.message: Check out the projects I'm using in my modpack!

app.instance.offline-installed-only.message: Offline mode can only launch fully downloaded instances.

app.instance.screenshots.delete-descript.message: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {name}?

app.instance.screenshots.empty-descripti.message: Screenshots taken in Minecraft will appear here automatically.

app.instance.worlds.delete-world-modal.w.message: This world will be permanently deleted from this instance. This action cannot be undone.

app.instance.worlds.no-worlds-descriptio.message: Add a server or browse to get started

app.instance.worlds.remove-server-modal..message: This server will be removed from your server list and from the in-game server list. You can add it again later if you know the address.

app.minecraft-auth.try-login-after.message: and signing in, as it may prompt you with the necessary steps. You can also contact support and we can investigate further.

app.minecraft-auth.unknown-description.message: We don't recognize this error and can't recommend specific steps to resolve it.

app.minecraft-auth.warning.message: We couldn't sign you in to your Microsoft account. This may be due to account restrictions or regional limitations.

app.modal.install-to-play.server-require.message: This server requires mods to play. Click Install to set up the required files from Modrinth, then launch directly into the server.

app.modal.update-to-play.update-required.message: An update is required to play {name}. Please update to the latest version to launch the game.

app.project.curseforge.unavailable-descr.message: The CurseForge project did not return any data.

app.project.translation.failed.message: Translation failed. The original content was kept. Try again.

app.server.compatibility-warning.message: This server may not be compatible with all instances.

app.settings.about.attribution.message: This application is a modified version of the open-source Modrinth project.

app.settings.about.original-source.message: View the original Modrinth source code

app.settings.defaults.fullscreen-descrip.message: Overwrites the options.txt file to start in full screen when launched.

app.settings.defaults.height-description.message: The height of the game window when launched.

app.settings.defaults.memory-description.message: The memory allocated to each instance when it is run.

app.settings.defaults.pre-launch-descrip.message: Run before the instance is launched.

app.settings.defaults.width-description.message: The width of the game window when launched.

app.settings.resources.app-cache-descrip.message: Axolotl Launcher caches data to speed up loading. Purging it forces the app to reload data and may temporarily slow the app down.

app.settings.resources.app-directory-des.message: The directory where the launcher stores all of its files. Changes apply after restarting the launcher.

app.settings.resources.database-backups-.message: Backups of important app data are stored here in case you need to recover them later.

app.settings.resources.maximum-downloads.message: The maximum number of files the launcher can download at the same time. Use a lower value on a poor internet connection. An app restart is required.

app.settings.resources.maximum-writes-de.message: The maximum number of files the launcher can write to disk at once. Use a lower value if you frequently get I/O errors. An app restart is required.

app.settings.resources.purge-confirm-des.message: If you proceed, your entire cache will be purged. This may slow down the app temporarily.

app.settings.resources.purge-confirm-tit.message: Are you sure you want to purge the cache?

app.skins.delete-modal.description.message: This will permanently delete the selected skin. This action cannot be undone.

app.skins.delete-modal.title.message: Are you sure you want to delete this skin?

app.skins.dropped-file-error.text.message: Failed to read the dropped file.

app.skins.modal.make-edit-first-tooltip.message: Make an edit to the skin first!

app.skins.offline-account.compatibility.message: Offline skins are applied locally with a resource pack. Compatibility is best on Minecraft 1.6–1.19.2; newer versions are supported on a best-effort basis. The skin is not uploaded to Mojang, may also replace other default-skinned players on your client, and some skin mods or server plugins may override it.

app.skins.rate-limit.text.message: You're changing your skin too frequently. Mojang's servers have temporarily blocked further requests. Please wait a moment before trying again.

app.skins.reorder-error.text.message: Your skin order could not be saved.

app.skins.section.modrinth-pride.tooltip.message: You received these skins for donating to a Modrinth Pride fundraiser during Pride Month.

app.skins.sign-in.description.message: Please sign into your Minecraft account to use the skin management features of Axolotl Launcher.

app.translation-settings.api-key-configu.message: An API key is already configured. Enter a new value to replace it.

app.translation-settings.api-key-optiona.message: Optional for local or unauthenticated endpoints.

app.translation-settings.auto-translate-.message: Start translating as soon as a Modrinth project page is opened.

app.translation-settings.cache-descripti.message: Successful translations are cached for seven days to reduce requests.

app.translation-settings.description.message: Translate Modrinth project titles, summaries, and descriptions while browsing content.

app.translation-settings.operation-faile.message: The translation operation failed. Check the configuration and try again.

app.translation-settings.style.preview-o.message: Explore high-quality Minecraft content on Modrinth.

app.translation-settings.style.preview-t.message: Discover high-quality Minecraft content on Modrinth.

app.update-popup.body.download-complete.message: Axolotl Launcher v{version} has finished downloading. Reload to update now, or automatically when you close Axolotl Launcher.

app.update-popup.body.linux.message: Axolotl Launcher v{version} is available. Use your package manager to update for the latest features and fixes!

app.update-popup.body.metered.message: Axolotl Launcher v{version} is available now! Since you're on a metered network, we didn't automatically download it.

app.update.complete-toast.text.message: Click here to view the changelog.

friends.add-friend.username.description.message: It may be different from their Minecraft username!

friends.add-friends-to-share.message: <link>Add friends</link> to see what they're playing!

friends.requests.none.message: You have no pending friend requests :C

friends.sign-in-to-add-friends.message: <link>Sign in to a Modrinth account</link> to add friends and see what they're playing!

instance.settings.tabs.general.delete.de.message: Permanently deletes an instance from your device, including your worlds, configs, and all installed content. Be careful, as once you delete a instance there is no way to recover it.

instance.settings.tabs.general.duplicate.message: Creates a copy of this instance, including worlds, configs, mods, etc.

instance.settings.tabs.general.library-g.message: Library groups allow you to organize your instances into different sections in your library.

instance.settings.tabs.general.update-ch.message: Release, beta, and alpha versions will be shown as available updates.
Release and beta versions will be shown as available updates.
Only release versions will be shown as available updates.

instance.settings.tabs.hooks.description.message: Hooks allow advanced users to run certain system commands before and after launching the game.

instance.settings.tabs.hooks.pre-launch..message: Ran before the instance is launched.

instance.settings.tabs.window.fullscreen.message: Make the game start in full screen when launched (using options.txt).

instance.settings.tabs.window.height.des.message: The height of the game window when launched.

instance.settings.tabs.window.width.desc.message: The width of the game window when launched.

instance.worlds.no_server_quick_play.message: You can only jump straight into servers on Minecraft Alpha 1.0.5+

instance.worlds.no_singleplayer_quick_pl.message: You can only jump straight into singleplayer worlds on Minecraft 1.20+

minecraft-account.offline-modal.descript.message: Choose the username used in offline games. This account can only join servers that allow offline players.

minecraft-account.offline-mode.descripti.message: Only offline accounts are available. You can launch fully downloaded instances.

unknown-pack-warning-modal.body.message: A file is only reviewed if it’s uploaded to Modrinth, regardless of its file format (including .mrpack).

unknown-pack-warning-modal.malware-state.message: Malware is often distributed through modpack files by sharing them on platforms like Discord.

unknown-pack-warning-modal.warning.body.message: We couldn't find this file on Modrinth. We strongly recommend only installing files from sources you trust.
